about.description: Local-first application to organize evidence and execution planning with an educational and organizational focus.
about.title: About
app.disclaimer: Educational and organizational use only. Not legal or immigration advice. No approval promise.
app.privacy_notice: Use fake/demo data only in this public repository. Do not commit sensitive personal data.
app.score_disclaimer: Score does not represent a real approval chance. It is only an organization and prioritization tool.
app.subtitle: Local-first tool to organize readiness evidence, gaps, and roadmap.
app.title: EB2-NIW Readiness Studio
assessment.question.academic: Does your academic track record support advanced specialization in the target field?
assessment.question.certifications: Do your certifications reinforce the technical narrative of your case?
assessment.question.community: Is your presence in talks, mentoring, or community work consistent and relevant?
assessment.question.documentation: Is your case documentation clear, coherent, and verifiable?
assessment.question.endeavor: Is the proposed endeavor clear, specific, and plausibly aligned with national impact?
assessment.question.experience: Does your professional experience show depth and continuity in the field?
assessment.question.impact_metrics: Do you have objective metrics proving impact of your outcomes?
assessment.question.public_projects: Do your public projects demonstrate technical authorship and practical impact?
assessment.question.publications: Do you have technical publications or relevant articles supporting your narrative?
assessment.question.recommendation_lette: Is there a concrete plan for recommendation letters from qualified authors?
assessment.question.recognition: Do you have external recognitions, awards, or independent validations?
assessment.question.seniority: Does your career progression demonstrate growing seniority and leadership?
assessment.question.strategic: Is your work aligned with a strategic field for the United States?
assessment.subtitle: Fill out the EB-2 assessment by dimension using score, justification, and associated evidence.
assessment.summary.title: Assessment summary
assessment.title: EB-2 assessment
dashboard.alert.low_eb2: EB-2 score is below 60. Prioritize the highest-weight gaps.
dashboard.alert.low_niw: NIW score is below 60. Strengthen the prongs with a practical plan.
dashboard.alert.no_evidence: No evidence registered yet. Start with verifiable artifacts.
dashboard.alert.none: No critical alerts at the moment.
dashboard.alert.pending_tasks: There are pending tasks in the roadmap.
dashboard.subtitle: Consolidated EB-2/NIW readiness view for organization and prioritization.
dashboard.title: Readiness dashboard
home.card.prongs_hint: Baseline to map evidence by prong.
evidences.subtitle: Manage evidence with status, relevance, related criteria, and AI sharing control.
evidences.title: Evidences
evidence.field.title: Title
gaps.subtitle: Automatic gap consolidation from assessment, NIW, evidences, and roadmap.
gaps.title: Gaps
action.raise_assessment_score: Improve evidence and justification to raise score
action.raise_niw_prong: Execute plan to strengthen NIW prong
action.replan_overdue_task: Replan task with a new due date
roadmap.subtitle: Manage tasks by horizon, priority, and status.
roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.field.title: Title
niw.prong.1.title: Prong 1
niw.prong.2.title: Prong 2
niw.prong.3.title: Prong 3
niw.subtitle: Assess the three NIW prongs with score, observations, gaps, and practical plan.
niw.title: NIW assessment
roadmap.task.authority: Plan a public technical authority cadence
roadmap.task.evidence: Organize evidence by impact and category
settings.subtitle: Choose the interface language and store it locally.
settings.title: Settings
